description: For a new proposal in the 'pharmaceutical' industry, an agent must find relevant past case studies from the company's internal knowledge base.

nodes.task_description: Search the internal knowledge base for case studies tagged with 'pharmaceutical' and 'supply chain'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent executes the search with the correct tags.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the top 3 most relevant case studies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a list of the 3 best matches.

nodes.task_description: For each of the 3 case studies, generate a one-paragraph summary to be included in the new proposal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates concise summaries suitable for a proposal.
